item.description: ‘It is unfortunate their loved one’s death was placed in the public arena ...when it need not have been.’

item.description: The anti-immigration campaigner was found dead with ‘serious injuries’.

item.description: ‘One day, you come back home but you come back home without a person.’

item.description: ‘He will be over the moon celebrating.’

item.description: The discount Aussies are getting at the bowser is due to run out on August 2.

item.description: The latest film in the cult animated series taps into a ‘modern anxiety’ for parents with a cautionary tale, but are those concerns unnecessarily inflated?

item.description: Commercial shipping through the key route remains severely disrupted.

item.description: ‘We’ve commenced a full investigation into this incident.’

item.description: Prince Harry and his wife quit royal life and moved to America six years ago.

item.description: ‘I know this is kind of weird, but this is what he said to me.’

item.description: The former champion’s victim threw in the towel when he ‘immediately reacted like ‘my jaw is broken’’.

item.description: The Bazball era appears all but over with the coach following Ben Stokes out the door.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Dramatic footage shows moment dogwalkers unleash pets on attacker
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: France dumped out as ‘exceptional’ Spain reach World Cup final with 2-0 win
item.description: Kylian Mbappe’s side were completely shut down by a ‘close to perfect’ Spanish outfit.

item.title: I’m A Celebrity… Get Me Out Of Here! coming to Channel Seven in 2027
item.description: An exciting new chapter is coming for one of television’s most talked-about franchises.

item.title: Aussie superstar Mollie O’Callaghan opens up on back injury ahead of Commonwealth Games
item.description: The Olympic gold medallist has revealed she was ‘told to stop swimming immediately’ after a devastating diagnosis.

item.title: Mystery bidder buys T-rex nicknamed ‘Gus’ for eyewatering sum
item.description: The 67-million-year-old fossil, nicknamed ‘Gus’, is now the most expensive set of dinosaur bones ever auctioned off.

item.title: Adelaide Crows defender Josh Worrell set to face court over car accident
item.description: Police investigated the 25-year-old after a collision with a pedestrian on his way to training.

item.title: New baby announced on Melbourne breakfast radio show Fifi, Fev & Nick
item.description: ‘I’ve got a little exciting announcement myself.’

item.title: Three healthy one-pan family dinners making dinner (and clean up) easier
item.description: Less mess, more flavour. These nutritious one-pan dinners are perfect for busy weeknights.

item.title: Kevin Sheedy bites back in blunt James Hird exchange: ‘That’s not right’
item.description: The premiership great spoke out on the same day his ex-captain held his latest job interview at Essendon.

item.title: Nissan Qashqai recalled
item.description: Certain Nissan Qashqais built between 2025 and 2026 with the e-Power hybrid system may have a software fault affecting their battery controller.

item.title: US passes bill to ‘ditch the switch’ and make daylight saving time permanent
item.description: The Sunshine Protection Act now heads to the Senate with bi-partisan support.

item.title: FIFA facing fresh scrutiny as World Cup final half-time show tipped to last 30 minutes
item.description: The longest World Cup in history is set to suffer one last indignity ‘of the football coming second’.

item.title: GPS tracker found fitted to car of man shot dead in brazen Carlingford attack
item.description: The man’s body was only discovered when plumbers arrived to work on the home.

item.title: 2026 Toyota LandCruiser 300 Performance Hybrid review: Quick drive
item.description: The LandCruiser 300 Series can now be had with hybrid power, but don’t mistake it for a jacked-up Camry.

item.title: Full extent of Gold Coast Suns’ escalating problems laid bare: Legacies on the line
item.description: ‘The AFL are not happy, (and) clearly players and coaches are not happy.’

item.title: Albanese reveals world-first AI standards set to hit parliament next year
item.description: ‘This world leading framework is about Australia choosing to shape the future rather than letting the future of AI shape us.’

item.title: Nicky Winmar kicked out of Australian Football Hall of Fame and St Kilda set to follow over assault conviction
item.description: The former St Kilda star’s legacy has been cut down after he was found guilty of assaulting a woman.

item.title: Record low? Not on our watch, say Wallabies
item.description: ‘We’re on the cusp of being a really good team.’

item.title: Gold Coast magician Daniel Hidden’s family reveals his remarkable life after scattering his ashes at his favourite places
item.description: His parents share never-before-told family stories, treasured photographs and the childhood moment they believe changed their family’s future forever.

item.title: Veteran rocker Jennifer Finch of L7 sidelined from farewell tour after brain cancer diagnosis
item.description: The musician now requires extensive medical care, rehabilitation and in-home support.

item.title: Ford Transit Custom and Tourneo recalled
item.description: The windscreen wipers in over 3000 Ford vans and people movers could gradually or suddenly stop working.

item.title: Ivan Cleary draws line through coaching both Penrith and NSW next year
item.description: The four-time premiership coach has only one thing on his mind ... and he’s going to give it his all.

item.title: Port Adelaide pick left-field option Willem Drew to replace Zak Butters as interim captain
item.description: ‘He’s well loved amongst the group, and he drives the standards gameday.’

item.title: Taco Bell under investigation as diarrhoea-causing parasite cyclosporiasis outbreak grows
item.description: A popular food chain is under investigation over claims it may be linked to the rapid spread of a parasite which can cause ‘explosive’ diarrhoea, which is now estimated to be impacting more than 7000 people.

item.title: Family reveals heartbreaking burden carried by Greenbank hit-and-run victim Tamatea ‘Tama’ Harrison before his death
item.description: ‘He didn’t deserve what happened. None of us can believe he’s gone.’

item.title: Victoria Police share image of man after women unleash dogs on accused sex offender
item.description: One of the dogs even managed to tear off a piece of his clothing.

item.title: Interim Essendon coach Dean Solomon scoffs at Zach Merrett narrative but can’t answer trade question
item.description: ‘If no one believes me, that’s OK.’

item.title: Why soaring popularity of electric vehicles could see all drivers paying a road user charge
item.description: All Australian motorists could soon end up paying a road user charge regardless of what they drive as the Iran war sparks a surge in electric vehicle sales.

item.title: Jane Bunn: Melbourne can pack the umbrellas away with sunshine on its way
item.description: The shift is likely to happen on Friday and should stick around.

item.title: Teen accused of Brisbane school stabbing granted bail as court hears alleged attack was retaliation over social media video
item.description: New claims about what unfolded in the lead-up to the alleged incident have been heard in court.

item.title: Bailey’s Law: NSW mum Carol Micallef’s big win in campaign to increase scrutiny of criminals in the community
item.description: Her son was just 18 when he was fatally stabbed by a man on two-year corrections order.

item.title: Could BYD buy Volkswagen? This German economist thinks so
item.description: Could Chinese EV giant BYD one day own Volkswagen? A leading German economist thinks it's possible.

item.title: ‘Coward act’: Family of Greenbank hit-and-run victim Tama Harrison urges driver to come forward
item.description: ‘I couldn’t even say my last goodbyes to him.’

item.title: Partnered Health hit by major cyber attack, impacted centres named
item.description: Twenty-one practices believed to have been impacted have been named.

item.title: Nate Caddy’s dad hit with ‘wake-up call’ after Essendon contract extension leaked at boozy function
item.description: ‘I don’t know whether he was intoxicated or not when he said it, but I’ve heard he was.’

item.title: Fast food allegedly stolen, wanted man chased in two separate Adelaide CBD incidents
item.description: The latest offences have raised concerns about the safety of city centre workers.
